title: Anchovy and Caramelized Flaky Pie Crust
description: A unique savory pie crust recipe featuring caramelized and flaky textures with the savory taste of anchovy.
instructions: Roll out the American pie crust and place it in a pie dish.
Spread the caramelized onions evenly over the pie crust.
Sprinkle the flaky sea salt over the onions.
Mix the anchovy paste and chopped parsley, and spread it over the onions.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
